commitMessage:
fix: 修复测试配置 + pre-commit hook 加全量测试

- pre-commit: 用 typecheck + 全量测试 + 模板测试替代增量测试
- 修复 TS2532 Object possibly undefined (prompts.ts, generator.ts)
- 安装 @types/fs-extra, @types/ora 解决类型声明缺失
- vitest.config.ts: 根配置排除 template/, 模板配置排除 src/
- 模板 vitest.config: 加 react/react-dom alias 防止双实例
author: xuyingzhou

PermissionGuard with multiple permissions should render children when user has any permission (mode=any)
PermissionGuard with multiple permissions should not render children when user has no permissions (mode=any)
PermissionButton should render button when user has permission
PermissionButton should not render button when user lacks permission
PermissionButton should render fallback when user lacks permission
Can should render children when user has single permission
Can should render children when user has all permissions (array)
Can should render fallback when user lacks permission
Cannot should render children when user lacks permission
Cannot should not render children when user has permission
Cannot should render fallback when user has permission
Cannot should work with multiple permissions (mode=all)
Cannot should work with multiple permissions when user has some (mode=all)
api request functionality should return data on successful response
api request functionality should trigger loading when withLoading() is called
api request functionality should NOT trigger loading when withLoading is not called
api request functionality should show error message on failure
api request functionality should NOT show error message when silentError() is called
api request functionality should NOT retry on non-retryable errors (401, 403, 404, 422)
